name: shmora
description: AI whiteboard tutor — monorepo (shared types + Express/Socket.io backend + React/Vite frontend).

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix backend run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix backend run typecheck && npm --prefix frontend run typecheck
